code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut total = 0
  while i < n
    let b0 = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      b
    when None
      0
    end
    if b0 == 32 or b0 == 9 or b0 == 13 or b0 == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      mut start = i
      if b0 == 45
        sign = -1
        start = i + 1
      else if b0 == 43
        start = i + 1
      end
      mut j = start
      while j < n
        let bj = match string.byte_at(line, j)
        when Some(b)
          b
        when None
          0
        end
        if bj == 32 or bj == 9 or bj == 13 or bj == 10
          j = n + 1
        else
          j = j + 1
        end
      end
      let stop = if j > n
        j - 1
      else
        j
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, stop)
      let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      let signed = sign * v
      if signed > 0
        total = total + signed
      else if signed < 0
        total = total - signed
      end
      i = stop
    end
  end
  println("r=#{total}")
end
